phase_name: Frontend shared API definition standardization and edge-case audit

completed_tasks.name: Extend the shared API client primitives
completed_tasks.progress: apiClient.ts exports ApiQueryPrimitive, ApiQueryValue, buildApiUrl, buildQueryString, withQuery, encodePathSegment, and jsonBody.

completed_tasks.name: Preserve structured error details and empty success responses
completed_tasks.progress: apiClient.ts exports ApiError with status/data/headers and parses 204/empty bodies via response.text().

completed_tasks.name: Document the API module standard
completed_tasks.progress: FE/artium-web/src/@shared/apis/README.md exists with the required standard sections and helper names.

blockers.description: STATE.md contains a stale Phase 20 stopped_at marker mixed with Phase 27 execution state.
blockers.workaround: Use roadmap.analyze plus Phase 27 artifact counts as source of truth; update stopped_at through gsd-sdk state.record-session before committing state.

blockers.description: Large unrelated source worktree changes exist outside Phase 27 plan 01.
blockers.workaround: Do not revert or stage unrelated files; stage only the files required for the active plan or handoff.

decisions.decision: Resume Phase 27 from plan 01, not from the stale phase-7 current_phase object returned by init.progress.
decisions.rationale: roadmap.analyze, STATE.md Current Position, and Phase 27 plan artifacts all point to Phase 27 plan 01 as the active work.

decisions.decision: Phase 20 context was captured separately and committed as e808e515.
decisions.rationale: Do not conflate Phase 20 discussion artifacts with Phase 27 execution.

uncommitted_files: Many unrelated source/planning files shown by git status; inspect before staging.
next_action: Run the structural rg checks from 27-01-PLAN.md, then cd FE/artium-web && npm run lint and npm run build. If green, write 27-01-SUMMARY.md and commit only the plan 01 files.
context_notes: Plan 27-01 implementation appears mostly present, but it has not been verified or summarized. The resuming agent must keep Phase 20 context work separate from Phase 27 execution state.
